source:
Framework7 comes with ultimate modular Color Picker component that allows to create color picker with limitless combinations of color modules.

Color Wheel Minimal example with color wheel in Popover wheePickerValue = value} colorPickerParams={{ targetEl: '.wheel-picker-target', }} > {#snippet media()} {/snippet} Saturation-Brightness Spectrum SB Spectrum + Hue Slider in Popover spectrumPickerValue = value} colorPickerParams={{ modules: ['sb-spectrum', 'hue-slider'], targetEl: '.spectrum-picker-target', }} > {#snippet media()} {/snippet} Hue-Saturation Spectrum HS Spectrum + Brightness Slider in Popover hsSpectrumPickerValue = value} colorPickerParams={{ modules: ['hs-spectrum', 'brightness-slider'], targetEl: '.hs-spectrum-picker-target', }} > {#snippet media()} {/snippet} RGB Sliders RGB sliders with labels and values in Popover rgbPickerValue = value} colorPickerParams={{ modules: ['rgb-sliders'], sliderValue: true, sliderLabel: true, targetEl: '.rgb-picker-target', }} > {#snippet media()} {/snippet} RGBA Sliders RGB sliders + Alpha Slider with labels and values in Popover rgbaPickerValue = value} colorPickerParams={{ modules: ['rgb-sliders', 'alpha-slider'], sliderValue: true, sliderLabel: true, targetEl: '.rgba-picker-target', formatValue(value) { return `rgba(${value.rgba.join(', ')})`; }, }} > {#snippet media()} {/snippet} HSB Sliders HSB sliders with labels and values in Popover hsbPickerValue = value} colorPickerParams={{ modules: ['hsb-sliders'], sliderValue: true, sliderLabel: true, targetEl: '.hsb-picker-target', formatValue(value) { return `hsb(${value.hsb[0]}, ${value.hsb[1] * 1000 / 10}%, ${value.hsb[2] * 1000 / 10}%)`; }, }} > {#snippet media()} {/snippet} RGB Bars RGB bars with labels and values in Popover on tablet and in Popup on phone rgbBarsPickerValue = value} colorPickerParams={{ modules: ['rgb-bars'], openIn: 'auto', barValue: true, barLabel: true, targetEl: '.rgb-bars-picker-target', formatValue(value) { return `rgb(${value.rgb.join(', ')})`; }, }} > {#snippet media()} {/snippet} RGB Sliders + Colors RGB sliders with labels and values in Popover, and previous and current color values blocks rgbSlidersColorsPickerValue = value} colorPickerParams={{ modules: ['initial-current-colors', 'rgb-sliders'], sliderValue: true, sliderLabel: true, targetEl: '.rgb-sliders-colors-picker-target', formatValue(value) { return `rgb(${value.rgb.join(', ')})`; }, }} > {#snippet media()} {/snippet} Palette Palette opened in Sheet modal on phone and Popover on larger screens palettePickerValue = value} colorPickerParams={{ modules: ['palette'], openIn: 'auto', openInPhone: 'sheet', palette: [ ['#FFEBEE', '#FFCDD2', '#EF9A9A', '#E57373', '#EF5350', '#F44336', '#E53935', '#D32F2F', '#C62828', '#B71C1C'], ['#F3E5F5', '#E1BEE7', '#CE93D8', '#BA68C8', '#AB47BC', '#9C27B0', '#8E24AA', '#7B1FA2', '#6A1B9A', '#4A148C'], ['#E8EAF6', '#C5CAE9', '#9FA8DA', '#7986CB', '#5C6BC0', '#3F51B5', '#3949AB', '#303F9F', '#283593', '#1A237E'], ['#E1F5FE', '#B3E5FC', '#81D4FA', '#4FC3F7', '#29B6F6', '#03A9F4', '#039BE5', '#0288D1', '#0277BD', '#01579B'], ['#E0F2F1', '#B2DFDB', '#80CBC4', '#4DB6AC', '#26A69A', '#009688', '#00897B', '#00796B', '#00695C', '#004D40'], ['#F1F8E9', '#DCEDC8', '#C5E1A5', '#AED581', '#9CCC65', '#8BC34A', '#7CB342', '#689F38', '#558B2F', '#33691E'], ['#FFFDE7', '#FFF9C4', '#FFF59D', '#FFF176', '#FFEE58', '#FFEB3B', '#FDD835', '#FBC02D', '#F9A825', '#F57F17'], ['#FFF3E0', '#FFE0B2', '#FFCC80', '#FFB74D', '#FFA726', '#FF9800', '#FB8C00', '#F57C00', '#EF6C00', '#E65100'], ], targetEl: '.palette-picker-target', formatValue(value) { return value.hex; }, }} > {#snippet media()} {/snippet} Pro Mode Current Color + HSB Sliders + RGB sliders + Alpha Slider + HEX + Palette with labels and editable values proPickerValue = value} colorPickerParams={{ modules: ['initial-current-colors', 'sb-spectrum', 'hsb-sliders', 'rgb-sliders', 'alpha-slider', 'hex', 'palette'], openIn: 'auto', sliderValue: true, sliderValueEditable: true, sliderLabel: true, hexLabel: true, hexValueEditable: true, groupedModules: true, palette: [ ['#FFEBEE', '#FFCDD2', '#EF9A9A', '#E57373', '#EF5350', '#F44336', '#E53935', '#D32F2F', '#C62828', '#B71C1C'], ['#F3E5F5', '#E1BEE7', '#CE93D8', '#BA68C8', '#AB47BC', '#9C27B0', '#8E24AA', '#7B1FA2', '#6A1B9A', '#4A148C'], ['#E8EAF6', '#C5CAE9', '#9FA8DA', '#7986CB', '#5C6BC0', '#3F51B5', '#3949AB', '#303F9F', '#283593', '#1A237E'], ['#E1F5FE', '#B3E5FC', '#81D4FA', '#4FC3F7', '#29B6F6', '#03A9F4', '#039BE5', '#0288D1', '#0277BD', '#01579B'], ['#E0F2F1', '#B2DFDB', '#80CBC4', '#4DB6AC', '#26A69A', '#009688', '#00897B', '#00796B', '#00695C', '#004D40'], ['#F1F8E9', '#DCEDC8', '#C5E1A5', '#AED581', '#9CCC65', '#8BC34A', '#7CB342', '#689F38', '#558B2F', '#33691E'], ['#FFFDE7', '#FFF9C4', '#FFF59D', '#FFF176', '#FFEE58', '#FFEB3B', '#FDD835', '#FBC02D', '#F9A825', '#F57F17'], ['#FFF3E0', '#FFE0B2', '#FFCC80', '#FFB74D', '#FFA726', '#FF9800', '#FB8C00', '#F57C00', '#EF6C00', '#E65100'], ], targetEl: '.pro-picker-target', formatValue(value) { return `rgba(${value.rgba.join(', ')})`; }, }} > {#snippet media()} {/snippet} Inline Color Picker SB Spectrum + HSB Sliders
{#if inlinePickerValue.rgb}
HEX: {inlinePickerValue.hex}
Alpha: {inlinePickerValue.alpha}
Hue: {inlinePickerValue.hue}
RGB: {inlinePickerValue.rgb.join(', ')}
HSL: {inlinePickerValue.hsl.join(', ')}
HSB: {inlinePickerValue.hsb.join(', ')}
RGBA: {inlinePickerValue.rgba.join(', ')}
HSLA: {inlinePickerValue.hsla.join(', ')}
{/if}
